title: Underground Unlimited
description: A cool mod that modifies the underground adding new blocks, new structures, and more. Hop into the deep unknown. Be careful though all who go only some come back.
body:
# Underground Unlimited

*The surface is just the beginning.*

The new but semi old Minecraft underground update was cool but still wasen't enough for me. I needed more. More blocks, more exploation, just MORE! Hitting bedrock is a special task involving progression paths blocked by beating bosses, getting rsources, and building a quick and easy way to the surface. 

## Features

**A New World Beneath Your Feet**: The Overworld now generates down to Y=-1024, creating an underground experience of unprecedented scale. Discover a world that grows stranger and more alien the deeper you descend.

**New Geological Layers**: As you dig deeper, the very stone changes around you. Mine through dense layers of Castorite, Gneiss, and other rock types that signal a change in the environment.

**Riches of the Deep**: The immense pressure of the deep has forged new, powerful materials. Discover a host of new ores like Osimum and Heart-Iron, each with its own unique properties and uses.

**Dynamic Music**: Yes you read that right. New music has been added that plays when specfic conditions are satafised.

**New Enchantments**: New enchantments have been added to progression to make your tools more exciting and adventrous. Some QOL enchants have been added for farming and other aspects of the game.

**Drills?**: New mining tech has hit the streats involving drills. Starting off pretty rusty drills help with lots of thing depending on what drill bit and engine you have. Guess you will just need to explore to find out.

**New Structures**: Find some new and exciting structures underground following the theme of left to be with more to come.


Please note that this mod is still in really early develoment. I have lots of plans for this mod. There are bound to be a LOT of bugs early on but I belive I have worked out some of the bigger ones. Please be mindfull that I am a one person developer and have another life outside of coding. I have many plans to make the underground 10X more exciting I am still building from the ground up.

With that said thanks and hope you enjoy. :)
